education.title: Electrical Power Engineering
education.description: I studied Electrical Engineering for three years, where I developed strong analytical and problem-solving skills. This technical foundation has enhanced my ability to approach challenges in web development with a systematic mindset.

education.title: NCC Level 4 Diploma In Computing
education.description: I completed an NCC Level 4 Diploma, where I gained a solid foundation in front-end development, including HTML, CSS, and JavaScript. This program equipped me with essential programming knowledge and practical skills

education.title: NCC Level 5 Diploma In Computing
education.description: I completed an NCC Level 5 Diploma, where I gained a solid foundation in backend development, focusing on PHP, Laravel, and database management. This program equipped me with the skills to create dynamic, data-driven websites, enhancing my ability to deliver robust web applications.

education.title: B.Sc (Hons) Computing
education.description: I completed the Bacher degree in Computing, where I gained knowledge and developed Android applications, Movie Ticket Booking System, and a web-based group project. This program equipped me with the skills to coorporate with team members, enhancing my ability to deliver robust web applications.
